title: Savills India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Savills India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
